Package org.rodinp.core.emf.tests.basics

Class ImplicitElementHandlingTests

java.lang.Object
org.rodinp.core.emf.tests.basics.ImplicitElementHandlingTests
public class ImplicitElementHandlingTests extends Object
Tests for the implicit children handling within light models.

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    void
    createComplexDependencyAndCheckImplicitChildren()
    Creates a complex dependency from one root parent element to another parent element, and checks that the implicit children have been recomputed in the lowest element in the hierarchy.
    void
    createDependencyAndCheckImplicitChildren()
    Creates a simple dependency from one root element to a parent element, and checks that the implicit children have been recomputed in the child root element.

    createProvider(IInternalElementType<? extends IInternalElement> parentType, IInternalElementType<? extends IInternalElement> childType)
